name: auphonic-cli
description: CLI tool for processing audio through Auphonic

scripts.build:standalone: bun build ./index.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/auphonic-macos-apple-silicon && bun build ./index.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile dist/auphonic-macos-intel && bun build ./index.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile dist/auphonic-linux-x64 && bun build ./index.ts --compile --target=bun-windows-x64 --outfile dist/auphonic-windows-x64
scripts.release:patch: bun version patch && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:minor: bun version minor && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:major: bun version major && git push && git push --tags
